scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,client,fetcher -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev:fetcher"
scripts.dev:fetcher: until curl -sf http://localhost:3001/contract > /dev/null; do sleep 1; done && cd youtube-fetcher && doppler run -- .venv/bin/python app/app.py
